source: Local project memory documents, not live webmaster dashboards.

platforms.name: 百度搜索资源平台
evidence: SEARCH_ENGINE_SUBMISSION_GUIDE.md records Baidu verification passed at 2026-04-02 20:55.
SEARCH_ENGINE_SUBMISSION_GUIDE.md records sitemap, homepage, and major pages submitted.
CHINA_SEARCH_ENGINE_GUIDE.md records Baidu verification passed and access token received.
platforms.seoAction: Refresh sitemap, maintain Baidu verification file, prepare baidu-submit-urls.txt, and prioritize Chinese GEO keywords.
platforms.note: Use Baidu as the primary confirmed search platform for Chinese SEO/GEO.

platforms.name: 百度统计
evidence: PROMOTION_LAUNCH_REPORT.md records Baidu Tongji configured with tracking code 7b3e99cf8369883da4fbdc05a82a7051.
SEO_MYTH_PLAN.md records Baidu Tongji as active.
platforms.seoAction: Keep Baidu analytics code available on legacy/content pages and use traffic data to refine high-performing SEO pages.
platforms.note: Useful for traffic feedback, not direct indexing.

platforms.name: 百度地图
evidence: SEO_MYTH_PLAN.md records Baidu Map as verified.
platforms.seoAction: Keep NAP information consistent: company name, phone, domain, and Jiangmen/Guangdong service area.

platforms.name: Bing Webmaster Tools
evidence: SEARCH_ENGINE_SUBMISSION_GUIDE.md and MULTI_PLATFORM_SUBMISSION_GUIDE.md list Bing as pending.
platforms.seoAction: Keep Bingbot allowed in robots.txt; submit sitemap after verification is recorded.
platforms.note: Do not mark as active until verification evidence exists.

platforms.name: Google Search Console
platforms.seoAction: Keep Googlebot and Google-Extended allowed; submit sitemap after verification is recorded.
platforms.note: Relevant for AI and international search, but not confirmed.

platforms.name: 360搜索站长平台
evidence: CHINA_SEARCH_ENGINE_GUIDE.md and MULTI_PLATFORM_SUBMISSION_GUIDE.md list 360 as pending.
platforms.seoAction: Keep 360Spider allowed; prepare verification upload when file is available.

platforms.name: 搜狗站长平台
